title: Ashoka becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Ashoka, also known as Asoka or Aśoka, most commonly known as Ashoka the Great, was Emperor of Magadha from c.

title: Chandragupta Maurya becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Chandragupta Maurya was the founder and the first emperor of the Maurya Empire, based in Magadha in the Indian subcontinent.

title: Bindusara becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Bindusara was the second Mauryan emperor of Magadha in Ancient India.

title: Brihadratha Maurya becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Brihadratha Maurya was the 9th and the last Emperor of the Mauryan Empire.

title: Dasaratha Maurya becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Dasharatha Maurya was the 4th Mauryan emperor from 232 to 224 BCE.

title: Samprati becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Samprati was the fifth emperor of the Maurya Empire.

title: Salisuka becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Shalishuka Maurya was the 6th Emperor of the Indian Maurya dynasty.

title: Devavarman becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Devavarman was the 7th Emperor of the Maurya Empire.

title: Satadhanvan becomes Mauryan Emperor
fact: Shatadhanvan or Shatadhanus was the 8th Emperor of the Maurya dynasty.
